article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.5. Attachment 1 - Letter to the Province from the Mayor 2026.01.27_.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Mayor Urges Province to Reform Speculation and Vacancy Tax Funding
briefs.summary: Burnaby's Mayor has written to BC's Finance Minister proposing that cities receive a direct share of Speculation and Vacancy Tax (SVT) revenue — a tax on empty or underused homes — rather than routing all funds through BC Housing. The letter also asks the Province to give Burnaby the power to run its own empty-homes tax, similar to Vancouver's.
briefs.action_required: If you own vacant or underused property in Burnaby, watch for potential new local empty-homes tax rules.
briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Construction & Development, Finance & Insurance
